pickup.name: Bottled Frostfire
pickup.effect: Temporarily chills armor to negate heat-based traps

encounters.trigger: Defeating the scavenger opens the gate to the inner sanctum

pickup.name: Essence of Void
pickup.effect: Coats weapons in shadow to bypass magical resistances

encounters.trigger: Passing the sentinel unlocks the ancient ritual chamber

pickup.name: Heart of the Sun
pickup.effect: Enhances fire output significantly for one final burst

encounters.trigger: Absorbing the heart initiates the boss fight sequence

boss.name: Lord of Eternal Decay
boss.victory_condition: Purify the throne with concentrated solar energy

objective: Purify the Ossuary by destroying the Lord of Eternal Decay
